title: October 2025 Lush Kitchen XL Unboxing
caption:
Unboxing October's Kitchen box - some of these have been on wishlists 🕷️📦🖤 
Lush Notebook: The little extras that make Kitchen special 📖✨ 
Incantation Shower Gel: Witchy vibes not 100% if it's the scent we've been craving but I'll take the colour🌙🧴 
Frog Spell Shower Gummy: Bouncy texture meets Halloween magic 🐸🔮 
Toil and Trouble Body Scrub: Those mini bats sitting on top took me right back to 2022 Halloween release 🦇⚡ 
Wizard Bubble Bar: Always impossible to guess the scent but that's the magic 🧙‍♂️💫 
Burning Rosemary Incense: Herbal and mystical, perfect autumn energy 🍂🔥 
Serpent Potion Body Butter: Slithering into skincare moisturising and protect season 🐍💚 
Magic Bath Bomb: Been waiting for this one - Kitchen finally delivered! ⭐🛁

nostalgiaNotes.title: Lush Notebook
nostalgiaNotes.body: A charming non-cosmetic extra that delights subscribers, reminiscent of Lush's tradition of including fun branded extras in special boxes.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Lush Notebook
nostalgiaNotes.body: A non-cosmetic branded item included as a bonus in the October 2025 Lush Kitchen XL subscription box.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Lush Notebook
nostalgiaNotes.body: Continues Lush's tradition of including lifestyle and stationery extras in special subscription and gift sets.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Incantation shower gel
nostalgiaNotes.body: A spellbinding Halloween Kitchen release that fans eagerly anticipate each autumn season.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Incantation shower gel
nostalgiaNotes.body: A seasonal Halloween Kitchen product, part of Lush's annual witchy autumn lineup.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Incantation shower gel
nostalgiaNotes.body: Part of Lush's annual Halloween Kitchen spellbook-themed collection, evoking dark botanical and witchy scent traditions.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Frog Spell shower gummy
nostalgiaNotes.body: Part of Lush's beloved Halloween Kitchen exclusives, a product format fans look forward to each year.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Frog Spell shower gummy
nostalgiaNotes.body: A Halloween Kitchen exclusive shower gummy, part of the autumnal spellbook-themed range.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Frog Spell shower gummy
nostalgiaNotes.body: A nod to classic witch's familiar imagery — the frog as a magical creature — rendered in Lush's playful shower gummy format.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Toil and Trouble body scrub
nostalgiaNotes.body: Named after the famous Macbeth incantation, this Halloween Kitchen scrub is a fan-favourite seasonal treat.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Toil and Trouble body scrub
nostalgiaNotes.body: A recurring Halloween Kitchen exclusive body scrub, inspired by the witches' chant from Shakespeare's Macbeth.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Toil and Trouble body scrub
nostalgiaNotes.body: Inspired by the witches' spell in Shakespeare's Macbeth — 'Double, double toil and trouble; fire burn and cauldron bubble.'

nostalgiaNotes.title: Wizard bubble bar
nostalgiaNotes.body: A cult Halloween Kitchen favourite that fans hunt down each year, originally released as a Halloween product before becoming a coveted Kitchen reappearance.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Wizard bubble bar
nostalgiaNotes.body: Originally released as a Halloween product, the Wizard bubble bar has reappeared periodically on the Lush Kitchen menu as a much-requested seasonal exclusive.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Wizard bubble bar
nostalgiaNotes.body: A Halloween bubble bar with roots in Lush's early seasonal product history, beloved for its whimsical wizard shape and distinctive fennel, tangerine, and juniperberry scent combination.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Burning Rosemary incense
nostalgiaNotes.body: A rare non-cosmetic Kitchen offering, beloved by fans who appreciate Lush's forays into home fragrance.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Burning Rosemary incense
nostalgiaNotes.body: A seasonal Kitchen exclusive incense product, part of Lush's Halloween and autumnal home fragrance offerings.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Burning Rosemary incense
nostalgiaNotes.body: Echoes the ancient tradition of burning rosemary for purification and protection, a perfect fit for Lush's autumnal witchy aesthetic.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Serpent Potion body butter
nostalgiaNotes.body: A Halloween Kitchen exclusive body butter that fans covet for its evocative, potion-inspired name and rich autumnal scent.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Serpent Potion body butter
nostalgiaNotes.body: A Halloween seasonal Kitchen exclusive, part of the 2025 autumnal spellcasting-themed range.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Serpent Potion body butter
nostalgiaNotes.body: Inspired by alchemical and folk magic traditions of serpent-based potions, fitting within Lush's Halloween spellcasting narrative for 2025.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Magic bath bomb
nostalgiaNotes.body: A long-coveted Kitchen classic that fans have chased for years, known for its incredibly powerful and lingering scent that even perfumed nearby catalogues.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Magic bath bomb
nostalgiaNotes.body: A recurring Lush Kitchen exclusive bath bomb that has appeared periodically since at least 2016, consistently selling out quickly due to high demand.

nostalgiaNotes.title: Magic bath bomb
nostalgiaNotes.body: A Kitchen classic that has returned multiple times since at least 2016, legendary among fans for its extraordinarily potent and long-lasting fragrance — reportedly strong enough to scent nearby Lush catalogues and packaging left in the same room.

products.name: Lush Notebook
products.description: A handy Lush-branded notebook, perfect for jotting down your favourite product combinations, bath rituals, or Kitchen wishlist. A fun non-cosmetic extra included in the XL subscription box.
products.nostalgiaNote: A charming non-cosmetic extra that delights subscribers, reminiscent of Lush's tradition of including fun branded extras in special boxes.

products.name: Incantation shower gel
products.description: A bewitching shower gel crafted for Halloween, wrapping you in dark, mysterious, and enchanting scents to cast a spell on your shower routine.
products.nostalgiaNote: A spellbinding Halloween Kitchen release that fans eagerly anticipate each autumn season.

products.name: Frog Spell shower gummy
products.description: A fun, squishy shower gummy in the shape of a frog, lathering up with a magical, enchanting scent to transform your shower into a witch's cauldron.
products.nostalgiaNote: Part of Lush's beloved Halloween Kitchen exclusives, a product format fans look forward to each year.

products.name: Toil and Trouble body scrub
products.description: A bubbling, cauldron-inspired body scrub that sloughs away dead skin with a dark, spiced, and magical scent blend worthy of any witch's potion.
products.nostalgiaNote: Named after the famous Macbeth incantation, this Halloween Kitchen scrub is a fan-favourite seasonal treat.

products.name: Wizard bubble bar
products.description: An adorably sparkly purple-hatted wizard bubble bar with a warm, unique scent of fennel oil, tangerine, and juniperberry — sweet, spicy, fruity, and utterly magical. Crumble under running water for a bubbling, enchanting bath.
products.nostalgiaNote: A cult Halloween Kitchen favourite that fans hunt down each year, originally released as a Halloween product before becoming a coveted Kitchen reappearance.

products.name: Burning Rosemary incense
products.description: Fragrant incense sticks infused with the cleansing, herbaceous scent of burning rosemary — perfect for setting a witchy autumnal atmosphere at home.
products.nostalgiaNote: A rare non-cosmetic Kitchen offering, beloved by fans who appreciate Lush's forays into home fragrance.

products.name: Serpent Potion body butter
products.description: A rich, indulgent body butter inspired by mystical serpent potions, deeply nourishing skin with a dark, magical, and spiced scent blend.
products.nostalgiaNote: A Halloween Kitchen exclusive body butter that fans covet for its evocative, potion-inspired name and rich autumnal scent.

products.name: Magic bath bomb
products.description: A truly enchanting bath bomb with a remarkably potent and long-lasting scent — fans have noted its fragrance is so strong it can perfume nearby objects even weeks later. Drop into your bath and let the magic unfold.
products.nostalgiaNote: A long-coveted Kitchen classic that fans have chased for years, known for its incredibly powerful and lingering scent that even perfumed nearby catalogues.
